release.title: KapiMart v3.2 — Spring Update
release.summary: This release brings a redesigned checkout experience, faster search, and expanded international shipping options.

item.title: One-Page Checkout
item.description: Complete your purchase without leaving the page. Address, payment, and confirmation — all in a single, streamlined flow.

item.title: Instant Search
item.description: Search results now appear as you type, with smart suggestions based on your browsing history and popular products.

item.title: Expanded Shipping
item.description: We now ship to 15 additional countries, including Japan, South Korea, and Brazil. Express delivery available in select regions.

item.title: Faster Page Loads
item.description: Product pages now load 40% faster thanks to optimized images and a new content delivery network.

item.title: Better Mobile Experience
item.description: The mobile app has been redesigned with larger touch targets, smoother animations, and improved accessibility.
Fixed an issue where discount codes were not applied correctly during checkout.
Resolved a bug that caused duplicate order confirmation emails.
Fixed incorrect stock counts on product pages after restocking.
